cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: ⅩⅤ The Devil
cards.interpretation: oppression, addiction, obsession, dependency, excess, powerlessness, limitations

cards.name: ⅩⅨ The Sun, reversed
cards.interpretation: blocked happiness, excessive enthusiasm, pessimism, unrealistic expectations, conceitedness
